auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your work.
auth.fewDetailsToSetUp: A few details to get you set up.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link.
auth.checkYourEmailBody: If an account exists, we sent a reset link to {{email}}.
auth.checkYourEmailBodyFallback: If an account exists, we sent a reset link to you.
auth.setNewPasswordSubtitle: Choose something you haven't used before.
auth.linkInvalidTitle: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.linkInvalidBody: Reset links are good for 1 hour.
auth.linkInvalidSubtitle: You'll need a fresh link to continue.
auth.statusPendingTitle: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
auth.statusPendingBody: We'll email you when an admin reviews it.
auth.statusRejectedTitle: Your account request was not approved.
auth.statusResetBody: Sign in with your new password.
auth.accountCreatedSuccessBody: An admin will review your access shortly.
auth.accountCreatedWarningBody: We couldn't queue your access request. Sign in and try again from Settings.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

welcome.heroPrompt: Where would you like to start?
welcome.heroSubtitle: More than just an assistant — a calm, patient companion for the work of translation.

authHero.subtitle: AI tools for translators working in oral languages.

chat.inputPlaceholder: What can I do for you today?
chat.enterToSend: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.voiceInputErrorBody: Enable mic permissions in your browser settings.
chat.voiceInputDeniedTip: Tip: enable microphone access in your browser's site settings, then click the mic again.
chat.tapSendWhenDone: Tap Send when you're done speaking — we'll transcribe and drop it in your message.

storyteller.name: Storyteller
storyteller.short: A story to illuminate the concept
storyteller.description: What Bible concept do you want to translate? I can tell you a story to help you understand it better.

conversation.name: Conversation Partner
conversation.short: Talk through it in plain dialogue
conversation.description: Want to explore a Bible concept? I can explain it or talk it through with you.

oral.name: Oral Performer
oral.short: Say it in clear, natural oral language
oral.description: Struggling to understand a Bible passage? I can say it in clear, natural oral language.

health.name: OBT Project Health Assessor
health.description: How's your project going? I can help you evaluate it through a guided conversation. Recommended quarterly.

backtrans.name: Back Translation Checker
backtrans.description: Need to check your translation? I can compare your back translation with the source text and point out possible issues.

profile.title: Settings
profile.profilePictureSubtitle: JPG, PNG up to 5 MB. Square crops work best.
profile.displayNameCardSubtitle: How you appear to others across Translation Helper.
profile.yourAccessSubtitle: Roles are managed by your platform admin.
profile.noRolesYet: No translation-helper roles yet. An admin needs to approve your access request.
profile.changePasswordSubtitle: We'll email you a secure reset link to set a new password.
profile.changePasswordExplain: For security, password changes go through the same flow as a forgotten password. You'll receive an email with a one-time link.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Every conversation you've had — open any one to pick up where you left off.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, preview, or assistant…
history.emptyBodyStart: Start one from the home screen.
history.emptyBodySearch: Try a different word, or clear the search to see everything.

adminPrompts.title: Agent prompts
adminPrompts.subtitle: Edit the system instructions for each AI assistant.
adminPrompts.name: Name
adminPrompts.promptSavedBody: {{name}} will use the new instructions on next chat.
